pkgmetadata.longdescription:
Helmor is an open-source local workbench for multi-agent software development — a Tauri 2 desktop client that orchestrates coding agents (Claude Code, Codex, Cursor) into a review-test-merge loop. Bundles a Bun-compiled sidecar that hosts the agent SDKs plus a helmor-cli companion binary. Upstream ships macOS DMGs only; this ebuild builds the Linux deb bundle from source via Tauri's cross-platform build pipeline and extracts it into the image.
Build prerequisites pulled in via BDEPEND: bun-bin (gentoo-zh overlay), Rust toolchain, webkit2gtk-4.1, libsoup-3, gtk3, glib, librsvg.
Note: upstream has no Linux CI, so this ebuild is best-effort until the Linux build path matures.
